title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 353.070 - General corporation laws unless conflicting apply
text:
353.070.  General corporation laws unless conflicting apply. — The provisions of the general corporation laws, as presently in effect and as hereafter from time to time amended, shall apply to urban redevelopment corporations, except where such provisions are in conflict with the provisions of this law.
(L. 1945 p. 1242 § 7)
